{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 2,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The output suggests a reorganization of the section but lacks a coherent end-to-end plan with per-section rationale.",
    "R1.7": "The output flags one missing citation, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The output does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stays within scope with one drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions are introduced; the original content is harm-free.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The output suggests a reorganization of the section but lacks a coherent end-to-end plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags one missing citation, but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stays within scope with one drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions are introduced; the original content is harm-free.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
